title: cecropia concolor subsp. engleriana
intro: Cecropia concolor subsp. engleriana is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to Central and South America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Cecropia concolor subsp. engleriana is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
